CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Jessica P. Lamiero, Esq., appearing for Defendant Airline Coach Services, Inc., No appearance by or on behalf of the Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no objection by appearing counsel nor an objection filed. The Court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385.
